name: Grade 5 Mathematics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 5 pathway for whole-number and decimal operations, volume, coordinate graphing, and fraction computation. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 5 knowledge and transferable skills in whole-number and decimal operations, volume, coordinate graphing, and fraction computation.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: whole-number and decimal operations, volume, coordinate graphing, and fraction computation
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about whole-number and decimal operations, volume, coordinate graphing, and fraction computation and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
